items.title: Add HomeOffice AI
items.description:
## Add: HomeOffice AI
    
**Link:** https://homeoffice-ai.com

**Description:** AI-powered tools and resources for remote workers and home office productivity

**Category:** Other Resources

**Why it fits this list:**
Curates the best AI tools, automation workflows, and productivity resources for remote workers. Features AI writing assistants, virtual meeting tools, smart scheduling, and home office setup recommendations.

---
_I believe this resource would be a valuable addition to this awesome list._

items.title: Review PR #1102 — Remote Signal API (JSON jobs + Show HN feed)
items.description:
**Merge request — Remote Signal API listing**

PR adds a JSON API for recruiting teams: 50 RemoteOK dev/SaaS jobs + 20 HN Show HN posts (15min cache).

- Live: https://intellectual-close-wages-west.trycloudflare.com/pricing
- Free: 10 req/day | Pro: $5 USDC/mo | Agents: x402 $0.02/req on Base
- Docs: https://gist.github.com/reckoning89/d87818b2020bbc27590df1fa0c42f175
- Verified: 138+ API calls from 40+ external IPs this week

Happy to adjust copy/format. Ready to merge when convenient — thanks for maintaining this list!

items.title: Add claudio: productivity tool for remote workers with voice dictation
items.description:
Repository: https://github.com/ayushkumar1808/claudio

claudio is a free, open-source macOS tool that enables system-wide voice dictation using your Claude subscription. Hold Space in any app (Slack, email, browser, terminal) to dictate text. Useful productivity tool for remote workers.
